INPUT | Sheet1!A2 | "Oracle Fusion Middleware 12c (12.1.2.0.0) Products:  - 1. Oracle WebLogic Server - 2. Oracle Coherence - 3. Oracle HTTP Server - 4. Oracle Application Developer Framework - 5. Oracle Virtual Assembly Builder - 6. Oracle Fusion Middleware Infrastructure which includes: WLS and Oracle Fusion Middleware security infrastructure - 7. Oracle TopLink - 8. Oracle Data Integrator  -  - ALL includes the following products: Oracle WebLogic Server, Oracle Coherence, Oracle HTTP Server, Oracle Application Developer Framework, Oracle Fusion Middleware Infrastructure, Oracle TopLink and Oracle Data Integrator Console. Oracle Virtual Assembly Builder is not included in ALL."
